name: Lemon Chicken Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine chicken, lemon juice, 1/2 of the salt, pepper, and lemon zest. Toss to mix.
2. On a large flat plate, coat the chicken with seasoned bread crumbs.
3. Spray Pam on a non-stick skillet and heat over medium-high heat.
4. Add the chicken and cook, turning once, until golden brown outside and white throughout (but still juicy—about 5-7 minutes).
5. Place chicken on a serving platter.
6. Steam fresh asparagus for approximately 5-7 minutes.
7. When done, season asparagus with remaining lemon zest and salt and pepper.
8. Divide asparagus into 4 bundles. Wrap each asparagus bundle with a slice of turkey "ham" and place on top of chicken.
9. Garnish with lemon slices.
